title: Phase 1 — RHI Layer & Frame Graph Setup
description: Establishes the renderer foundation: GP Engine RHI configuration for the target API (Vulkan recommended), frame graph setup with a skeleton of all planned passes registered as stubs, transient resource declarations for all G-buffer and intermediate targets, and a validation test that executes all passes with no-op shaders to verify barrier correctness. Building the frame graph skeleton before implementing any pass is the industry-standard approach to avoid architectural dead ends. Students will deliver a running frame graph with all passes executing and validated by the Vulkan debug layer with zero validation errors.
